RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling as to the 1st Cause of Action only:
PLAINTIFF SIU YUEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION: Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED. Motion For Summary Adjudication re 1st Cause of Action is DENIED as seeking an advisory opinion. Motion For Summary Adjudication re 2nd Cause of Action is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel shall submit proposed forms of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
